Security Policy

Source: SECURITY.md

Supported Versions

The following versions are currently being supported with security updates.

Version Supported
0.3.3 ✅
0.3.2 ✅
0.3.1 ❌
< 0.3.0 ❌

Developed by Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin. Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.

surveyframe is an open-source R package for survey research. MIT License.
